text:
Assassin C was one of the assassins hired by the Ten Dons to eliminate the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 95 

Appearance

An enigmatic individual, Assassin C was a man with a medium build. He had short hair and wore clothing with a primitive style. His face was covered by a mask with eyes and a mouth drawn on it. In the 2011 anime adaptation, he is depicted as dark skinned. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 51 (2011) 

Personality

There is almost nothing known about Assassin C's personality. His face was never seen, he barely spoke, and he was never seen again after his initial introduction. The only indication of his personality was that he preferred the color red when other assassins suggested that they should each pick a code name. Kurapika said that along with the other assassins (besides Assassin A and Assassin B), Assassin C was intimidated by Silva and Zeno Zoldyck. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Assassin C is one of the assassins hired by the Ten Dons to eliminate the Phantom Troupe. Assassin D suggests picking code names for each other and Assassin E adds that colors should work. After Assassin F asks to be called "Blue", Assassin C says that he wants to be "Red". 

Assassin C is not seen again after the meeting. Since Chrollo kills both Assassin A Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 97 and Assassin D, and Zeno mentions that some of the hired assassins have already been killed, it can be rightly assumed that Assassin C was also killed inside the Cemetery Building. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 

Equipment

Assassin C was seen holding a weapon similar to a was-sceptre and a scythe. His proficiency with it was unknown.

Abilities & Powers

Since he was hired by the Ten Dons to eliminate the Phantom Troupe, it can be inferred that he was at least strong enough to be recognized as suitable for the job. However, his abilities were never shown.

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga or anime adaptations.
